description:
§18.9 — a `match` wrapped in a `${...}` logic interpolation (`

${ match @role { ... } }

`) is recognised as a statement and SHALL NOT fire E-TYPE-026. Acceptance sibling of e-type-026-match-in-markup-pos: proves the bare-match-in-markup detector is scoped to unwrapped text, not the well-formed interpolated form.
rationale: §18.9: a `match` inside a `${...}` logic interpolation is a valid statement position, so the markup-level-match check is correctly silent.
